minting_now.name: TREND APP NFT V2
minting_now.description:
Imagine being one of the earliest investors in Facebook, TikTok, or Instagram—before the world realized their potential. Now, imagine if your investment wasn’t just a bet on growth but a guaranteed piece of ownership in the company itself.
That’s exactly what the TREND App Inc. NFT Collection offers

minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

Definition: A set of principles or direction used to navigate and make decisions in life.

This collection explores the intricate balance between individuality and connection. It is a visual journey of finding one’s way while resonating with the world around us.

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre) There will be two cohorts of crypto projects: those with government relations and those without. We believe being leaders on the Hill will pay huge dividends as...
